name: medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient reconciliation of patient records and medical billing.
